channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flying tipping in Belmont Park, 29th June
item.description:
Lots of rubbish in the park from a fly tipper

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Belmont Lane, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Denmark Hill SE5, near junction with Champion Park. Much loose litter., 29th June
item.description:
Please clear.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Denmark Hill, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bins, 29th June
item.description:
Flats bin store overflowing

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping furniture, 29th June
item.description:
Over a week now and uncollected

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Balchen Road, Kidbrooke
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Expanding Flytip at the end of Henry Street (again!), 29th June
item.description:
In the early hours of Saturday various items were dumped a printer, chair and a bike. In the early hours of this morning books, a vacuum and more were added. Please can you clear this before all the residents of Freelands road decide to add their unwanted items to the pile. Some enforcement action would be nice as well rather than chasing people in the high street for dropping cigarettes. Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 45, Freelands Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped with needles, 29th June
item.description:
Rubbish bags dumped on pavement, strewn on path, I can see at least two hypodermic needles.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Station Approach Eltham, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household items and clothes on the pavement, 29th June
item.description:
Items are dumped here every single day.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alkham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household items dumped on the pavement, 29th June
item.description:
There is rubbish left here every single day

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lampard Grove, Hackney, London

item.title: Bags of rubbish dumped, 29th June
item.description:
Been there for 4 weeks. Previously reported

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hemsworth Street, Hackney, London

item.title: Wooden pallets on the pavement, 29th June
item.description:
There are items left here every single day

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lampard Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous road surface, 29th June
item.description:
An ongoing problem - have reported in the past but nothing has been done. The road sufface here is SO BAD - anyone crossing the road elderly or otherwise is in danger of tripping /falling and cars have to navigate a shocking road surface just as it meets a main road / junction. Why is nothing done to repair it?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 86, Whitehall Park, Archway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Disgusting fly tipping / food waste rubbish, 29th June
item.description:
Every time I walk past here there is the most hideous dsngerous pile of rubbish as in this photo

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 177, Archway Road, Muswell Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping by bin, 29th June
item.description:
Black bins bags have been left for nearly a week

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hoskins Street, Greenwich

item.title: Fence down in children’s play park, 29th June

item.title: 60-62 Alexandra Drive, 29th June
